message: Morning, all. Laptop open, brain mostly engaged - got the corn dog copy ready for eyes. Fair warning: there's texture in there, so curious what lands.
Texture is good - that's what made the last round work so well, yeah?
Yeah, that push you gave me last round stuck - made me cut the shortcuts and actually sit with what the thing tastes like instead of how clever I could sound about it.
The shortcuts thing matters - let me see what you actually wrote before we call it done.
Margaret's right - let's see it before we sign off on anything.
Cutting the clever stuff - that's the work. Send it over when you're ready.
